gates.title: Runtime doctor separates installed-product health from operator history
evidence_required: DoctorCheck carries a conservative category default so unclassified critical checks still block
run_doctor propagates the diagnostic plane to runtime checks
installation_live filters operator_history checks while preserving installed-product blockers

gates.title: Post-update self-heal writes a verified repair baseline
evidence_required: _run_runtime_post_sync writes operations/last-repair-baseline.json only after import verification succeeds
Codex session history and protocol compliance checks respect the post-update repair baseline
Historical transcripts and protocol rows are not rewritten or deleted

gates.title: Release closeout blocks installed-product criticals, not stale local history
evidence_required: verify_release_readiness.py still runs the runtime doctor during final closeout
The closeout gate exits non-zero only for critical checks categorized as installed_product
Focused tests cover the installed-product blocker filter

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.9
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.30.9
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.9
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.9 contract before tag publish
